phases.focus: Setting up the non-blocking engine and local AI infrastructure.
Building the brain, managing memory, and securely retrieving enterprise data.
Hardening the application for production scale, high concurrency, and cloud migration.

tasks.title: API Security & Throttling
tasks.details: Implement Bucket4j-based Token Bucket rate limiting synced via Redis.

tasks.title: Circuit Breakers & Fallbacks
tasks.details: Integrate Resilience4j to protect the application from PostgreSQL/LLM timeouts and failures.

tasks.title: The External Brain Migration Prep
tasks.details: Abstract the AI model interface to toggle between Local Ollama (Enterprise) and Groq API Llama 4 (Edge SaaS).

tasks.title: Distributed Observability
tasks.details: Add Micrometer and Prometheus to track RAG latency, token generation speed, and WebFlux health.

tasks.title: High Concurrency Load Testing
tasks.details: Write a k6 script to barrage Sentinel with WebSocket connections, proving the Netty event loop holds up.

phases.focus: Building the real-time client and deploying the full stack to Edge infrastructure.

tasks.title: The WebSocket Controller Layer
tasks.details: Expose the AnalysisService via a Spring WebFlux WebSocket Handler for bi-directional streaming.

tasks.title: React Router v7 Scaffold
tasks.details: Bootstrap a modern React Router (Vite) project with native WebSocket client connections.

tasks.title: UI/UX & Mermaid Renderer
tasks.details: Integrate Shadcn/ui (Dark Mode) and build the component to render Mermaid.js strings into live diagrams.

tasks.title: Streaming Text UI
tasks.details: Build the 'typewriter' effect component that consumes the SentinelChunk stream and renders Markdown instantly.

tasks.title: Infrastructure as Code (Fly.io)
tasks.details: Provision a fly.toml environment: Native PostgreSQL (pgvector) and Internal Redis inside a private WireGuard mesh.

tasks.title: The Edge Deployment
tasks.details: Deploy the Spring Boot Backend (Groq inference) and React Router Frontend to Fly.io micro-VMs.

tasks.title: The Architect's Artifact
tasks.details: Finalize MLOps README detailing the pivot from Local SRE to Fly.io Edge SaaS.
